clean_headline: Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Limited has incorporated wholly owned subsidiary company(ies) in India.
raw_headline: Clarification on Significant  Movement of Price of the Secuities of the company

clean_headline: Puravankara Limited received Registration Certificate from Karnataka Real Estate Regulatory Authority (KRERA) for project Northern Lights by Puravankara KVN
raw_headline:
The Exchange has sought clarification from DCM Financial Services Ltd on March 13, 2026, with reference to Movement in Price.

The reply is awaited.
